title: selaginella auriculata
intro: Selaginella auriculata, also known as the ear-leaved spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, ear-shaped leaves and creeping stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella auriculata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Selaginella auriculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various forms.
